# Copilot instructions — Financial Agentic Platform

Local-only RAG app. Windows + PowerShell. Python 3.11 in `.venv`. No cloud.

## Stack
- **UI:** Streamlit (`streamlit run src/ui/app.py --server.port 8516`)
- **LLM:** Ollama — `llama3.2:1b` (fast/planner), `qwen2.5:3b` (strong analyst)
- **Embeddings:** Ollama `mxbai-embed-large` (1024-dim)
- **Store:** Docker `pgvector` container, DB `financial_rag` on `localhost:5432`
- **Graph:** LangGraph — `planner → retrieve → analyst → finalize`

## Layout
```
src/agents/      graph.py, planner/analyst/retrieve nodes, router.py, retrieval.py, vector_store.py
src/storage/     db.py (psycopg + pgvector), embeddings.py
src/ingestion/   loaders.py (pdf/docx/xlsx/etc.), pipeline.py (folder scan, dedup)
src/ui/app.py    Streamlit
data/documents/  drop folder (ingested on startup)
evals/           CLI harness; writes evals/results/policy.json consumed by router
```

## Conventions
- Use `.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe`, not system Python.
- `.env` drives everything — never hardcode model names, URLs, or paths.
- Schema changes go in `ensure_schema()` (`src/storage/db.py`); must be idempotent (`IF NOT EXISTS`).
- Retrieval modes (`RETRIEVAL_MODE=vector|keyword|hybrid`) and optional stages (`RETRIEVAL_REWRITE/MULTI_QUERY/HYDE/RERANK`) are env toggles read on every call.
- Streaming runs the graph on the caller's thread (`stream_run`) so `st.*` works; the compiled LangGraph is the non-streaming path.
- Model selection: `router.pick_model(complexity)` — policy.json wins over env wins over defaults.

## Edit discipline
- Make only the change asked. No drive-by refactors, no new abstractions for one-off ops.
- No docstrings/comments on code you didn't change. New comments only when *why* is non-obvious (one short line).
- Don't touch `evals/results/*.json` — generated by `python -m evals.run_evals`.
- Don't add fallbacks/feature flags for hypothetical cases; trust internal contracts.
- Prefer editing existing files over creating new ones.

## Commands
```powershell
# App
streamlit run src/ui/app.py --server.port 8516

# Ingest manually (DB tables created on first VectorStore())
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv(); from src.ingestion.pipeline import ingest_folder; from src.agents.vector_store import VectorStore; print(ingest_folder(VectorStore()))"

# Evals + router policy
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m evals.run_evals            # full
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m evals.run_evals --limit 6  # smoke

# DB inspection
docker exec pgvector psql -U postgres -d financial_rag -c "SELECT filename, COUNT(*) FROM documents d JOIN document_chunks c ON c.document_id=d.id GROUP BY filename;"
```

## Gotchas
- Restart Streamlit after `policy.json` changes — router caches it at process start.
- Changing `EMBEDDING_MODEL`/`EMBEDDING_DIM` requires dropping `document_chunks` (vector column dim is fixed).
- `psql` is not on PATH on this box — always go through `docker exec pgvector psql ...`.
- `.env` must contain `DATABASE_URL`, `EMBEDDING_DIM`, `EMBEDDING_MODEL`, `OLLAMA_MODEL`, `OLLAMA_BASE_URL`, `DOCUMENTS_DIR`.
